name: desperation-gating
description: Verify crime storylets only available to desperate NPCs (desperation > 0.4)
preconditions: Crime storylet with desperation_min 0.4, test NPC desperation=0.2 (no) and 0.8 (yes)
expectedOutcome: Desperate NPC (0.8) accesses crime storylets, non-desperate (0.2) doesn't
